In just two months on the job, Cindy Hyde-Smith has already earned failing grades from two major conservative organizations. NumbersUSA, a watchdog group seeking to stop illegal immigration, and Mark Levin’s Conservative Review both gave Hyde-Smith a failing grade, 25% and 50% respectfully. | | | | [ ](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-byuuiid-ydllhlurty-r/)

Peter,
In just two months on the job, Cindy Hyde-Smith has already earned failing grades from two major conservative organizations.
NumbersUSA, a watchdog group seeking to stop illegal immigration, and Mark Levin’s Conservative Review both gave Hyde-Smith a failing grade, 25% and 50% respectfully.
**This should come as no surprise, given how Cindy Hyde-Smith used to be a Democrat and was hand-picked by the Washington establishment.**
This is just weeks after Hyde-Smith claimed to support balancing our nation’s budget, but voted against Senator Rand Paul’s “penny plan” which would have done exactly that.
Cindy Hyde-Smith has already proved she doesn’t have the credentials to represent Mississippi’s conservative values. Together we can bring a strong conservative voice back to the Senate for Mississippi.
\- Chris

**On The Trail with Chris**

name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9a0126fbb6065f11f3909ee6b35ede719eb4e5f731ea3af8fcf4508510a84232b81b0807a71e4c00cff3757faa651675078d56a07e6d72f

Larry Kudlow: “Trump Is Presiding Over Extraordinary Growth. G-7 Leaders Should Notice.”

- The Washington Post

“President Trump travels to Canada to attend his second Group of Seven summit as the leader not just of the largest and fastest-growing G-7 economy in the world but also as the most important pro-growth reformer of our times,” writes Larry Kudlow, Director of the National Economic Council. “There’s a simple lesson in President Trump’s record of achievement: Believe him. Nowhere is this lesson clearer than when it comes to President Trump’s passion as a trade reformer.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9a0126fbb6065f1e5b221a733fcda57cfe64db314dc7c1fae57ab7985e5527b1d88248c04b0e2244902156e912fb2ad066ed27ba6c238e4

Peter Navarro: The Era of American Complacency on Trade Is Over

- The New York Times

“President Trump welcomes continuing dialogue and cooperation with Group of 7 members and our other allies and trading partners. But the days of accepting unfair trade practices are over,” writes Peter Navarro, Assistant to the President for Trade and Manufacturing Policy. “Trade must be not only free but also fair and reciprocal.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9a0126fbb6065f1d677ac6d5ffa06307e76fff8e5c526f3d2d99f73afbbec20340eee95fb070f41be7e030b2bd3ba1986296a71e5ed6704

White House Launches Opioid Education Campaign That Targets Young People Using Shock Value

- USA Today

The White House Office of National Drug Control Policy has partnered with the Ad Council and the Truth Initiative to release an ad campaign targeting young adults to raise awareness of opioid abuse. The four ads “bring into sharp relief two major facts: How quickly some people can become hooked and addicted and the lengths to which they will go,” Counselor to the President Kellyanne Conway said.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9a0126fbb6065f1444397dc09a743533810e1123fb5c022cba9406286bb13917eecbe710a74cd233e7ddc68fac945a1436afa955ffb335b

Alice Johnson to Trump: 'I Am So Grateful for Everything You’ve Done for Me and My Family'

- The Washington Free Beacon

“Alice Marie Johnson gave a message to President Donald Trump on Thursday after he commuted her sentence this week, expressing gratitude for what he did for her and her family,” Andrew Kugle writes. “It's an amazing feeling. Especially just being with my family again,” Johnson said after President Trump commuted her life sentence for a nonviolent drug offense.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9a0126fbb6065f14640774bd73ac39dff45c04f83609e2588e1c2d0c01aeb9d11c44bafb7410b3270d8889fe7081135c141b3527df2483f

Total Jobless Claims Running at Lowest Level in 44 Years

- Washington Examiner

“The total number of workers receiving unemployment benefits is running at the lowest levels in 44 years, the Department of Labor reported Thursday in more encouraging news about the economy,” Joseph Lawler writes. “In recent months, [unemployment benefits] claims have been the brightest among a number of labor statistics that suggest that the jobs market is red hot.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9a0126fbb6065f11d8f861aa3030eb3f67ea84da38adc11eeba7e10df5957907e77aeeb042f6a2e9c21b89a4886aac82c39c3c2637fdf67
Trump Signs VA Law to Provide Veterans More Private Health Care Choices

- USA Today

By signing the VA MISSION Act, President Trump paved the way “for a major overhaul of the Department of Veterans Affairs and expanded access for veterans to VA-funded care in the private sector,” Donovan Slack reports. “The measure, which passed both chambers of Congress last month with overwhelming bipartisan support, delivers on a key campaign promise for Trump, who pledged to provide veterans with more non-VA health care choices.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9a0126fbb6065f116fa10f83c35209e2692c36886a1402f3101f52f348b2b73f225b5d871f8aa7e4f744da5e2ecdf6986fc75d400e49565

Wayne Allyn Root: “The Trump Miracle”

- Townhall

“It’s a new day under President Trump. We are free to make money again. We are free to practice capitalism without guilt. The sun is out. The skies are blue. There’s a job in every pot. The Trump Miracle lives,” Wayne Allyn Root writes.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9a0126fbb6065f1596611de2eb3e2efc29d33e4f61997105a91be7c2fcb69bea9f5a803c722ad7badeafd854c6e56cbf27507d04ca4eace
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9a0126fbb6065f13e744993ee939c0d3875e25ec78d53ee716b505a6afa915ea66b16da0eb240c4777e93e3a8a9ccaaa8731b81550210e5
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48898376e6300c2f9ced5be8a4cf4ae1ccc0d0c635d921e8c784dddffc356149615c6f0aee58da52673507b59c56dcdec68a54061769ca407
Unsubscribe

name: Tom Perez
subject: Let me explain why Tuesday's primary results matter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
After Tuesday's primaries, I can tell you for certain we're at a huge turning point in the midterms. Let me explain why:
---
After Tuesday's primaries, I can tell you for certain we're at a huge turning point in the midterms. Let me explain why:

These primary results proved Democrats have momentum and we are harnessing the growing enthusiasm across the country -- and together we came out with some incredible wins. Here are a few highlights:
* In New Mexico, women won their primaries. No Latina Democrat has ever been elected governor, but this November, Democratic nominee Michelle Lujan Grisham is ready to change that and make history. Additionally, if Debra Haaland wins New Mexico's 1st congressional district she would be one of the first Native American women to serve in Congress.
* In Iowa, Democratic women were successful in their primaries -- Abby Finkenauer (IA-01) and Cindy Axne (IA-03) have the potential to be the first women in Iowa's congressional delegation. Deidre DeJear won the nomination for secretary of state and if elected would be Iowa's first African American statewide elected official.
* In Iowa, primary turnout demonstrated major enthusiasm with more than 279,000 ballots cast across the state. The previous record was 233,090 votes, set in 2014.
* In Missouri, Lauren Arthur was elected to state Senate District 17, making it the 42nd state legislative flip from red to blue. Trump won the seat by four points, and Arthur won by 19 points.
* This year in Alabama, there were more than 70 black women running up and down the ticket -- a historic number -- and proving yet again that they are the backbone of our party.
* Democratic voter turnout in Tuesday's New Jersey primaries was up by more than 70% from 2014, with more than 175,000 additional Democrats casting ballots.
* In New Jersey, where Trump's approval rating stands at an abysmal 34%, there is one GOP-held congressional seat that Hillary Clinton won in 2016 and a total of four flip opportunities in NJ-02, NJ-03. NJ-07, and NJ-11.
* And the candidates poised to take on those four red New Jersey districts are each a force to be reckoned with. Look no further than Mikie Sherrill, a former Navy pilot, federal prosecutor, and mother of four, who won her race in NJ-11, where 23-year GOP incumbent Rodney Frelinghuysen was forced into retirement.
* In California, there were 42 Democratic women on the ballot for the congressional races.
* Democrats made big gains in California's Orange and San Diego Counties, historically Republican strongholds, while the GOP vote was down in CA-48 and CA-49 compared to the 2014 primary.
* In South Dakota, Billie Sutton, a former top rodeo rider who lost his ability to walk after a rodeo accident when he was 23, is the Democratic nominee for governor.

Tuesday was a great night for our party -- but we can't sit back and call it a day. As more primaries end, general elections begin -- and right now campaigns and state parties across the country are ramping up their organizing efforts to take their message to voters. Those campaigns and state parties are counting on our support now. Not in October -- now. So I'm asking:

**Can I count on you to make your first $3 contribution of 2018? If you've been waiting to get involved, now is the time.**

clean_body: After Tuesday's primaries, I can tell you for certain we're at a huge turning point in the midterms. Let me explain why: After Tuesday's primaries, I can tell you for certain we're at a huge turning point in the midterms. Let me explain why: These primary results proved Democrats have momentum and we are harnessing the growing enthusiasm across the country -- and together we came out with some incredible wins. Here are a few highlights: In New Mexico, women won their primaries. No Latina Democrat has ever been elected governor, but this November, Democratic nominee Michelle Lujan Grisham is ready to change that and make history. Additionally, if Debra Haaland wins New Mexico's 1st congressional district she would be one of the first Native American women to serve in Congress. In Iowa, Democratic women were successful in their primaries -- Abby Finkenauer (IA-01) and Cindy Axne (IA-03) have the potential to be the first women in Iowa's congressional delegation. Deidre DeJear won the nomination for secretary of state and if elected would be Iowa's first African American statewide elected official. In Iowa, primary turnout demonstrated major enthusiasm with more than 279,000 ballots cast across the state. The previous record was 233,090 votes, set in 2014. In Missouri, Lauren Arthur was elected to state Senate District 17, making it the 42nd state legislative flip from red to blue. Trump won the seat by four points, and Arthur won by 19 points. This year in Alabama, there were more than 70 black women running up and down the ticket -- a historic number -- and proving yet again that they are the backbone of our party. Democratic voter turnout in Tuesday's New Jersey primaries was up by more than 70% from 2014, with more than 175,000 additional Democrats casting ballots. In New Jersey, where Trump's approval rating stands at an abysmal 34%, there is one GOP-held congressional seat that Hillary Clinton won in 2016 and a total of four flip opportunities in NJ-02, NJ-03. NJ-07, and NJ-11. And the candidates poised to take on those four red New Jersey districts are each a force to be reckoned with. Look no further than Mikie Sherrill, a former Navy pilot, federal prosecutor, and mother of four, who won her race in NJ-11, where 23-year GOP incumbent Rodney Frelinghuysen was forced into retirement. In California, there were 42 Democratic women on the ballot for the congressional races. Democrats made big gains in California's Orange and San Diego Counties, historically Republican strongholds, while the GOP vote was down in CA-48 and CA-49 compared to the 2014 primary. In South Dakota, Billie Sutton, a former top rodeo rider who lost his ability to walk after a rodeo accident when he was 23, is the Democratic nominee for governor. Tuesday was a great night for our party -- but we can't sit back and call it a day. As more primaries end, general elections begin -- and right now campaigns and state parties across the country are ramping up their organizing efforts to take their message to voters. Those campaigns and state parties are counting on our support now. Not in October -- now. So I'm asking: Can I count on you to make your first $3 contribution of 2018? If you've been waiting to get involved, now is the time. Peter --
In the past few months, our team has seen lots of encouraging signs about our chances in November.
A sitting U.S. Senator from across the aisle said Phil Bredesen has been “been an outstanding public servant” and “would be good at almost anything.”
Multiple polls show our campaign in the lead, with a majority of Democrats, Independents, and Republicans approving of Governor Bredesen.
Energized crowds of Tennesseans, from of every walk of life, are coming together on the campaign trail to show their support for Governor Bredesen’s pro-Tennessee message.
We are opening offices across the state, in communities large and small, to make sure this campaign is about the people of Tennessee.
[**And thousands of grassroots supporters (like you) are pitching in whatever they can ahead to help get our message of common sense in front of voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1371735/7492876/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwOWI1ZS0wMjZjLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rt3XibPjBW1f7kTgDPS5tWOwen-3txNFGvvwL9khHu0=&refcode=em180609-150days-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15&recurring=true)

name: Action Petition from Tim Kaine for Virginia
subject: STOP offshore drilling in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Against offshore drilling in Virginia and beyond? Join us and sign our petition against it. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Against offshore drilling in Virginia and beyond?** [Join us and sign our petition against it >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e4/3e0906/65e294a7/3e3433ec/259283130/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stop-offshore-drilling?source=20180609_1_PET_TEAM_Offshore-Drilling&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Join+us+and+sign+our+petition+against+it&utm_campaign=20180609_1_PET_TEAM_Offshore-Drilling")
* * *
Derek, Virginians have made it clear where we stand.

Concerned Virginians ranging from coastal property owners, to business owners, to former military officials, are all speaking out about the implications of the Trump administration's offshore drilling plan - one that proposes to open up the vast majority of U.S. coastal waters to oil and gas drilling: | **Virginians gather on beaches to say no to offshore drilling** _- Augusta Free Press_

**Senators concerned over offshore drilling impacts on Virginia Military** _- wtvr.com_

**Virginia Beach wants the same protection from offshore drilling that Florida was promised** _- The Virginian-Pilot_
---
Oil spills and side effects related to offshore drilling have the potential to absolutely decimate tourism and fishing industries.

**To put it plainly: These are risks Virginia simply can 't afford.** We would be risking our economy - not to mention a healthy ocean, Chesapeake Bay waters, and beaches.

**Are you against the plan to expand offshore drilling across American coastal shores? Do you want to stop dangerous offshore drilling on Virginia coastlines?[Add your name and tell us here >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e4/3e0906/65e294a7/3e3433e3/259283130/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stop-offshore-drilling?source=20180609_1_PET_TEAM_Offshore-Drilling&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+and+tell+us+herenbspgtgt&utm_campaign=20180609_1_PET_TEAM_Offshore-Drilling")**

And it's not just business and tourism - _offshore drilling in Virginia is concerning for our military and defense._

Norfolk houses the world's largest naval base, and the Department of Defense has a significant footprint in coastal Virginia, one that could be compromised by dangerous environmental activity.

Tim has been putting pressure on the current Administration and Department of Defense to protect our coastlines and the important industries, operations, people, and wildlife they are home to.

[It's not too late - sign your name to say no offshore drilling in Virginia, and protect our coastlines and the valuable assets they hold >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e4/3e0906/65e294a7/3e3433e2/259283130/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stop-offshore-drilling?source=20180609_1_PET_TEAM_Offshore-Drilling&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Itrsquos+not+too+late++sign+your+name+to&utm_campaign=20180609_1_PET_TEAM_Offshore-Drilling")

Thanks for signing,

_Tim Kaine for Virginia, Petition Team_

name: R. Jai Gillum
subject: Our daughter
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb304d/9e00690/47db50ec/24023a61/1108107432/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180608_EqualP_acq_gq_act__RJai&source=em18_180608_EqualP_acq_gq_act__RJai")
Friends,

As parents, you have to have all kinds of conversations with your children -- from explaining that you can't eat candy for dinner every night, to encouraging them to go after their dreams even when it seems too hard.

But one conversation I never want to have is explaining to my daughter that she'll only make 61 cents for every dollar paid to her male colleagues. Unfortunately, despite the Equal Pay Act passing 55 years ago, we won't see the wage gap close until 2059 -- so that's a conversation Andrew and I will have to have with her unless we act.

**[It's simple: women's rights are human rights. And it's long past time that Florida had a Governor who will work with women to make sure equal pay for equal work is a reality. Will you add your name to join me and Andrew in the fight to end the wage gap?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb304d/9e00690/47db50ec/24023a60/1108107432/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-demand-equal-pay?gpsid=13_55_1120&source=em18_180608_EqualP_acq_gq_act__RJai&utm_campaign=em18_180608_EqualP_acq_gq_act__RJai&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Itrsquos+simple+womenrsquos+rights+are+h")**

In Florida, more than 1,000,000 households are headed by women -- but on average they're still paid 13 cents less than men, with the gap drastically widening for women of color.

Families are losing thousands of dollars in wages each year, making it harder for them to buy necessary goods or saving and investing for their futures. Andrew and I truly believe we can rebuild Florida into a state where anyone, regardless of gender, can get ahead. But it's going to take all of us raising our voices to make it happen.

**[Add your name now and join us in this fight -- it's time to close the gap.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb304d/9e00690/47db50ec/24023a63/1108107432/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-demand-equal-pay?gpsid=13_55_1120&source=em18_180608_EqualP_acq_gq_act__RJai&utm_campaign=em18_180608_EqualP_acq_gq_act__RJai&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+now+and+join+us+in+this+fi")**

Thank you,

R. Jai Gillum

name: Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
subject: Reckless Putnam Must Resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UcbgYEGkBYkdmHUQsicmBsYydS-eHQNctfc1FjLRc94=/2fMtGCV6uKRJ0w6zUVyWjVr1HiVRWvCoE3D5ciFOpH4=?refcode=june-9-Reckless-Putnam-Must-Resign)

Friend,
As you may have seen, the office of our current Agricultural Commissioner and Republican candidate for Governor, Adam Putnam, issued concealed carry permits for a year without conducting background checks.
ONE WHOLE YEAR! 365 DAYS!!
Why? Because they couldn't log in to the FBI database and did nothing about it.
**This failure of oversight by Putnam, who referred to himself as a "proud NRA sellout," speaks to the overall carelessness and lack of attention to gun safety precautions by NRA-bought candidates in general.** It is another example of why it's simply not enough to have a law -- a culture of enforcement has to be part of it. For this reason, Adam Putnam should resign and end his campaign for Governor; he simply cannot be trusted to keep Florida families safe.
In this race, my opponent Mario Diaz-Balart, has not only taken more NRA money than any member of Congress from FL in the past 20 years, but he has also accepted over ten thousand dollars from Adam Putnam.
I call on Congressman Diaz-Balart to return every single penny of this blood money.
At some point, after our children have died, our feeling of peace and safety threatened, and a neverending cycle of gun violence that leaves over 20,000 dead EVERY YEAR, do we say enough is enough?
**Mario Diaz Balart is part of the problem** and he can't be trusted to keep us safe while he takes money from the NRA and Adam Putnam.
**\- Mary**

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Women's rights disappearing
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | | **"Step by methodical step, the Trump administration is remaking government policy on reproductive health -- moving to limit access to birth control and abortion and bolstering abstinence-only sex education."** \-- _PBS Newshour_ ; 5/30/2018
---
I wrote to you before about the Trump Administration's latest "methodical step" in dismantling access to reproductive care: **A proposed rule that would cut off Title X funding for Planned Parenthood and clinics like it.**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f24/622b7b5b/1b01a5f9/307b81fb/1081496420/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180605")
---
As of today, that rule is working its way through the process. But here's what you might be asking: Why so sneaky? Why not debate policy changes in the light of day and hold votes?
Here's why: **Because when Republicans openly attack Planned Parenthood, they lose.** People stand up. People fight back.
So instead, Republicans resort to shady rule changes and less well-known tactics. And in this sinister way, they chip away at women's rights bit by tiny bit.
**I refuse to stand by and let Republican get away with this.** This slow death-by-a-thousand-cuts approach is just as damaging to women in this country as a straight-up floor vote. And it requires just as much grassroots power to fight back.
[**_I'm asking you to add your voice to mine today. Demand the Trump Administration stop their shadow campaign against women's rights in America._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f24/622b7b5b/1b01a5f9/307b81fb/1081496420/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180605")
I don't want to wake up one day to realize that Republicans succeeded in cutting off access to reproductive health. We must stay vigilant and organized.
Thank you for your activism today.
Debbie

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Let me explain why this request is so important, especially today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
It is our job not only to defeat Trumpism, but to do it with candidates who offer a progressive vision and hope for where this country can go.
#
Friends -
In just a moment I am going to ask you to make a donation to Ben Jealous' campaign for Governor of Maryland. And while I know you may not be from that state, I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request is so important, especially today.
With Donald Trump in the White House, it is more important than ever that we elect great governors all across this country. And in this election, it is our job not only to defeat Trumpism, but to do it by supporting candidates who offer a progressive vision and hope for where this country can go.
And I am here to tell you that there are very few individuals I know -- running for any office -- who have the record of progressivism that Ben Jealous does.
Now, Ben's primary is in less than three weeks and the polls show him with a slight lead. This wasn't always the case. But as the campaign has progressed and he's gotten his message to more and more people, his standing in the polls has improved.
Now if we can get him the resources he needs to finish strong, I believe that he will win.
But, like me, Ben doesn't rely on millionaires and billionaires for money. His grassroots campaign is funded by lots of people giving small amounts of money. So, if he is going to see this through, it's going to take people like you helping him across the finish line.
That is why I am asking you today:
**[Can you make a $3 donation to Ben Jealous' campaign for Governor? He was there for our campaign when few were, and he can win if we're with him. Chip in today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben?refcode=em180609-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben?refcode=em180609-t1-full")**
In his campaign, Ben Jealous is talking about health care as a right for every man, woman and child. He is talking about our broken criminal justice system and the absurdity that so many of our young people are unable to afford an education because of the income level of their families.
He is addressing the global crisis of climate change and the need for real, comprehensive immigration reform. He is talking about the belief that a woman should be making the decisions about what happens to her own body.
Ben Jealous is the former President of the NAACP and is someone who has been on the front lines of the struggle for racial justice, economic justice, environmental justice, and more.
He was there for us as a leading surrogate on our presidential campaign when the financial and political establishment were fighting back hardest against us.
Today, I want to be there for him. And if you'll join me, if we all come together and help Ben today, he is going to win in a few weeks.
**[Can you make a $3 donation to Ben Jealous' campaign for Governor? Ben is a great progressive. He was there for our campaign when few were. He can win if you're with him. Chip in today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben?refcode=em180609-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben?refcode=em180609-t1-full")**
One of the ways we can most effectively oppose Donald Trump's right-wing extremism is with strong progressive leadership at the state and local level.
And there are few progressives stronger than Ben Jealous. Let's help get him elected.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Will you join the Canary Club?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Every day, I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a cage. And to me, it's much more than an accessory. Miners used to bring canaries into the mines in order to check for dangerous levels of gas. If the canary died, they knew to get out of the mine. Back then, there were no formal protections for workers. So they banded together to fight for the right to collectively bargain. Years ago, I went to a Workers' Memorial Day rally in Lorain, Ohio, and a steelworker from Local 1104 gave me the canary pin. I've worn it ever since. It reminds me not just of the workers' rights movement, but of every hardworking man and woman in America, the families they support, and how important it is for me and for this grassroots team to keep fighting for each of those families. The canary pin is an important symbol for me -- and to this campaign. So today, we're announcing the Team Sherrod Canary Club. Our organization runs on one $26 average online contribution at a time. If you [**_match that by giving $26 today, you'll become a member of the Team Sherrod Canary Club._** ](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff90c/4462dc26/52637399/2007dfef/473969336/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180608z?refcode=sbe180608z_m&amount=26")We'll even send you a free bumper sticker as a thank you. | [](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff90c/4462dc26/52637399/2007dfef/473969336/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180608z?refcode=sbe180608z_m&amount=26")
---
These next five months will not be easy. But as long as we face them together, we will come out ahead in November -- and we'll be able to continue fighting for hardworking families in Ohio and across the country.
With gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Travis Tazelaar
subject: I'm telling you, he's always been larger than life
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
These stories are something else.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a644/7ab0e2c4/7f83150a/349ba7d9/441705565/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-june-mdmn?refcode=OHQ06098A") Friend, I've been tagging along with Ben and Dave Chappelle for the last couple of days, and it's been something else. Hearing Dave talk about him, Ben's always had a larger than life outlook -- it probably comes from being a larger than life guy (figuratively... and literally). When Dave was performing at little places in New York City, people assumed he was Dave's bodyguard. (Ben is over six feet tall, after all.) But he also has larger than life ideas, for Maryland and for our country. Dave said he's seen that for years, even from when they were kids: Dave's stage was comedy, Ben's was making the world a better place. Standing with Dave backstage, he told me it was funny watching him after all these years. **Dave believes in Ben's plan for Maryland, because Ben's spent his life making everywhere he's committed to better.** [**There's one last fundraising deadline before the primary, and we need to make it count: Donate $5 or more today to finish this fight strong.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a644/7ab0e2c4/7f83150a/349ba7d9/441705565/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-june-mdmn?refcode=OHQ06098A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a644/7ab0e2c4/7f83150a/349ba7d8/441705565/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-june-mdmn?amount=5&refcode=OHQ06098A&express_lane=true")

---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a644/7ab0e2c4/7f83150a/349ba7da/441705565/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-june-mdmn?amount=50&refcode=OHQ06098A&express_lane=true")
---

---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a644/7ab0e2c4/7f83150a/349ba7c4/441705565/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-june-mdmn?amount=250&refcode=OHQ06098A&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a644/7ab0e2c4/7f83150a/349ba7c7/441705565/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-june-mdmn?refcode=OHQ06098A&express_lane=true")
---
The priorities that are the cornerstones of Ben's campaign would be the progress Maryland needs no matter who is in the White House -- but right now, there's too much at stake to step back.
And unlike other candidates, Ben isn't looking ten years down the road to make the changes that will make Maryland outstanding. He has plans that will go into effect the day he steps into the Governor's Mansion, from fully funding public schools to finally achieving Medicare-for-All.
Dave's one of the people who has known Ben for most of his life, so he trusts him because Ben's earned it. But the thing is, everyone Ben's ever worked with agrees, because that's the kind of guy Ben is. He'd make an incredible governor -- and Dave said that for once, he'd be honored to stand in the wings watching Ben, instead of Ben watching him.
[**If you're ready to make Maryland the best it can be, join Dave Chappelle and donate $5 or more before tomorrow's final fundraising deadline of this primary.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a644/7ab0e2c4/7f83150a/349ba7d9/441705565/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-june-mdmn?refcode=OHQ06098A")
Thanks,
Travis

body:
Good news, team -- we are only $871 away from closing this gap.

I think we can get this done before noon -- can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help make that happen?

**_[https://secure.bobcasey.com/deadline](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66ad/51dbcc2a/61559d3/3a518b5/1522733472/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwOV9mcjFfbmRfcmVtIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180609_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

On Wed, Jun 6, 2018, Bob Casey wrote:

[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66ad/51dbcc2a/61559d3/3a518b6/1522733472/VEsE/ "http://www.bobcasey.com/")

I'm going to give it to you straight, team: we didn't raise as much money in May as we expected, and there will be devastating consequences if we don't make up the difference this month.

My team keeps sending me news clips about how this is going to be one of the most expensive Senate races in the country, how Congressman Barletta is expecting a flood of outside spending any day now, and how Democrats will win or lose the Senate majority based on the strength of our campaigns in states like Pennsylvania.

**_[We need to raise another $4,100 by midnight to stay on track. Please, can you chip in $5 to help close the gap?](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66ad/51dbcc2a/61559d3/3a518b5/1522733472/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwOV9mcjFfbmRfcmVtIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180609_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: BREAKING: Health Care Under Threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

The Administration just moved to eliminate one of the most important health care protections we have in place: the guarantee that insurance companies can't deny coverage to people with pre-existing medical conditions.

This is my friend Pete. Pete has ALS, a pre-existing condition. He was a social worker for 23 years and takes on this devastating disease with an incredible spirit.

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=s6WEqlKGN3A99kmCyPMa0hlUcgOGefeu)
---

This week the U.S. Justice Department argued that the law that makes insurance companies cover people like Pete or anyone who has a pre-existing condition is unconstitutional. That is wrong and I will fight it.

Insurance companies shouldn't be able to deny coverage or charge higher rates to people with asthma, high blood pressure, cancer, diabetes or any pre-existing medical condition. The protections we have in law are a lifeline to 130 million Americans and they must stay in place.

**We defeated the Administration 's plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act before and now we need to protect millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions from losing their access to health care -- [will you join me and stand up for people like Pete today?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=GdfWma%2Flenfcmx5hVIzYfBlUcgOGefeu)**

\-- Amy

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: $10,000 to get back on track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi -- June marks an important deadline, so I want to tell you why emails like this one are so important to me.
Most elected officials spend a good chunk of time at fundraising events or dialing for dollars. It's a sign of a broken campaign finance system when the people you elect focus on fundraising rather than the job you sent them to Congress to do.
The support you provide in response to emails like this allows me to focus on passing legislation, holding the line against an extreme administration, and talking to Granite Staters and hard-working families across the country. I can't say enough how much I appreciate everything you do, everyone.
My team let me know that if we're going to hit our June fundraising goal, we need to hit $10,000 by midnight tomorrow. Unfortunately, we're pretty short and it looks like a donation of $3 or more would help us make up ground.
[**Could you please give $3 or whatever feels right to you? Your gift would mean the world to me personally and would go a long way toward getting us back on track.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a3/2a380d31/edb0239/f199b7/772905078/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDYwOV9TZWxmMl9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180609_Self2_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

| **Peter,**

Nobody in congress is standing up the liberals' stooge Robert Mueller, who is "investigating" whether it was YOU who voted for President Trump or whether it was the Russians.

Mueller was hired for one thing: to investigate "collusion" between President Trump's campaign and Russia.

After an exhausting 1 year investigation, the House Intelligence Committee has confirmed that **_there was absolutely no collusion between President Trump and Russia. Not one scintilla of evidence to be found ANYWHERE._**

[We know that the Russian investigation was based on a hoax Russian dossier created and funded by Hillary Clinton's campaign and the Democrat party.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=28ef1f2d8c&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| [ ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=b84cfeb594&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
Bob Mueller's "investigation" into Russian interference in our elections has cost you $11 million dollars -- paying Clinton lawyers $500 an hour and more... how long do we foot this bill?
| **So why do _Republicans_ in Washington insist that President Trump _NOT_ shut down this $11 million dollar (and counting) Russian Investigation fiasco?**

_**Because they are politicians and politicians lack spines, brains, or both.**_

If there is a single reason why Republicans are going to let Mueller move on with his hoax investigation, they must tell us what that reason is and **NOW**.

We need to elect people who are unafraid to stand up for our president and for what we know is right.

If you haven't already, [sign this letter](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=31a511e16c&e=9da9b0ca31). Tell Congress to defund Mueller NOW and to stand up for our President.
[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=31a511e16c&e=9da9b0ca31) If we sit this one out, the radical leftist agenda will continue to win through their favorite tactics of lying, cheating, and stealing. The radical left know that it is only by cheating that they can win. They also know that it is the complacent among us who will allow them to get away with their schemes. Complacence is never the way of a true conservative.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.

Courtland Sykes

What we're fighting for in Ohio is more than just one victory on Election Day -- it's the ability to win all the battles that come after. Holding banks accountable. Reforming campaign finance. Raising the minimum wage. Closing the pay gap. Protecting Medicare and Social Security. The list is long and ever-growing. Today, I'm giving you the chance to help this campaign, fuel our grassroots efforts, and win a trip to Cleveland to join Vice President Biden and me. You'll also have the chance to get an Instagram-worthy photo with the two of us. How can you pass that up? This is exciting - There's a new video out that we think you'll want to see! It profiles Jacky and why our race here in Nevada is so important - and essential if we want to take back the Senate for Democrats.
